steps.text: Issue an advisory to alert US healthcare providers and the public about the threat of Zika and its likely spread.
Report suspected Zika cases to public health departments.
Report confirmed Zika cases to CDC.
Activate the Emergency Operations Center to manage the agency's Zika response.
Form teams to focus expertise on different areas of the response.
Deploy teams of experts to assist in public health responses in affected areas.
Identify gene mutations that are responsible for the increasing problem of antibiotic-resistant gonorrhea.
Transition from PFGE to state-of-the-art whole-genome sequencing (WGS) to solve foodborne outbreaks faster.
Implement genomic surveillance of TB to help pinpoint outbreaks of TB.
Fund states to form regional networks and collaborations with academic partners for workforce development.
Partner with the Food Safety Centers for Excellence to develop online trainings on AMD for epidemiologists.

constraints.text: Pregnant women should postpone travel to areas with Zika.
